workbookDisplayName.defaultValue: MSO - Privileged Access and Admin Abuse

metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 👑 Privileged Access & Admin Abuse
---
Monitors privileged identity activity across Entra ID, Azure subscriptions, Office 365, and service principals. Detects role changes, PIM activations, anomalous admin actions, and service principal misuse."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📊 Privileged Activity Summary"},"name":"summary-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Remove member from role', 'Add user', 'Delete user', 'Reset user password')
| summarize SensitiveOps = count()
by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"Sensitive directory operations over time","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-dir-ops-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureActivity
| where CategoryValue == 'Administrative'
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| summarize AzureOps = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"Azure administrative operations over time","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-azure-ops-trend"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔐 PIM Activations & Role Changes"},"name":"pim-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == 'PIM'
| extend InitiatedByUser = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedByApp = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUser), InitiatedByUser, InitiatedByApp)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, ActivityDisplayName, Actor, Result, ResultDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"PIM activations & role assignments","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Result","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"success","representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-pim"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == 'PIM'
| extend InitiatedByUser = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUser), InitiatedByUser, 'App')
| summarize ActivationCount = count() by Actor
| sort by ActivationCount desc
| take 10","size":3,"title":"Top PIM users by activation count","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"customWidth":"40","name":"chart-pim-users"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Remove member from role')
| extend InitiatedByUser = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedByApp = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUser), InitiatedByUser, InitiatedByApp)
| mv-expand TargetResource = parse_json(tostring(TargetResources))
| extend TargetUPN = tostring(TargetResource.userPrincipalName)
| extend RoleName = tostring(TargetResource.displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, TargetUPN, RoleName, Result
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Role assignment changes — who added/removed whom from which role","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"OperationName","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Add member to role","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-role-changes"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ⚙️ Service Principal Activity"},"name":"sp-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| summarize
    TotalSignins = count(),
    FailedSignins = countif(ResultType != '0'),
    UniqueSPs = dcount(ServicePrincipalId),
    UniqueResources = dcount(ResourceDisplayName)
| project TotalSignins, FailedSignins, UniqueSPs, UniqueResources","size":4,"title":"Service principal sign-in summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalSignins","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-sp"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where ResultType != '0'
| summarize FailedCount = count() by ServicePrincipalName, IPAddress
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Service principals with failed sign-ins","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailedCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"FailedCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-sp-failures"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| summarize SigninCount = count(), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by ServicePrincipalName, ResourceDisplayName
| sort by SigninCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Most active service principals by resource accessed","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"LastSeen","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"SigninCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":1000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-sp-active"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add application', 'Add service principal', 'Add service principal credentials', 'Update application', 'Update service principal')
| extend InitiatedByUser = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedByApp = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUser), InitiatedByUser, InitiatedByApp)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, Result, ResultDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"New app registrations & service principal credential changes","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Result","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"success","representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-app-changes"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ☁️ Azure Subscription Admin Actions"},"name":"azure-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureActivity
| where CategoryValue == 'Administrative'
| summarize
    TotalOps = count(),
    SuccessOps = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'),
    FailedOps = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Failed'),
    UniqueCallers = dcount(Caller)
| project TotalOps, SuccessOps, FailedOps, UniqueCallers","size":4,"title":"Azure administrative operations summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalOps","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-azure"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureActivity
| where CategoryValue == 'Administrative'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('roleAssignment', 'policyAssignment', 'delete', 'write')
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceProviderValue, ActivityStatusValue
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Sensitive Azure operations — role assignments, policy, deletes","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-azure-sensitive"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureActivity
| where CategoryValue == 'Administrative'
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| summarize OpCount = count() by Caller
| where isnotempty(Caller)
| sort by OpCount desc
| take 10","size":3,"title":"Top Azure admin actors","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"customWidth":"40","name":"chart-azure-callers"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📧 Office 365 Admin & Privileged Operations"},"name":"office-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"OfficeActivity
| where Operation in~ (
    'New-TransportRule',
    'Set-TransportRule',
    'New-InboxRule',
    'Set-InboxRule',
    'Add-MailboxPermission',
    'Set-Mailbox',
    'Add-RecipientPermission',
    'Set-AdminAuditLogConfig',
    'Set-OrganizationConfig',
    'Disable-OrganizationCustomization'
)
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, OfficeWorkload, Parameters, ResultStatus, ClientIP
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Sensitive Exchange/Office admin operations","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ResultStatus","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"True","representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-exchange-admin"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"OfficeActivity
| where Operation in~ ('Add-MailboxPermission', 'Add-RecipientPermission')
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, OfficeObjectId, Parameters, ClientIP
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Mailbox delegation changes","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-mailbox-delegation"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"OfficeActivity
| where Operation in~ ('New-TransportRule', 'Set-TransportRule', 'New-InboxRule', 'Set-InboxRule')
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, OfficeObjectId, Parameters, ClientIP
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Mail flow rule changes — potential exfil setup","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-transport-rules"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Cross-Layer Admin Correlation"},"name":"correlation-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let EntraAdmins = AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Remove member from role')
| extend Actor = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(Actor)
| summarize EntraRoleChanges = count() by Actor;
let AzureAdmins = AzureActivity
| where CategoryValue == 'Administrative'
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where Caller has '@'
| summarize AzureOps = count() by Actor = Caller;
let OfficeAdmins = OfficeActivity
| where Operation in~ ('New-TransportRule', 'Set-TransportRule', 'New-InboxRule', 'Set-InboxRule', 'Add-MailboxPermission')
| summarize OfficeOps = count() by Actor = UserId;
EntraAdmins
| join kind=leftouter AzureAdmins on Actor
| join kind=leftouter OfficeAdmins on Actor
| project Actor, EntraRoleChanges, AzureOps = coalesce(AzureOps, 0), OfficeOps = coalesce(OfficeOps, 0)
| extend TotalActions = EntraRoleChanges + AzureOps + OfficeOps
| sort by TotalActions desc","size":0,"title":"Admins active across multiple layers — Entra, Azure, and Office 365","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TotalActions","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":50}},{"columnMatch":"EntraRoleChanges","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TotalActions","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-cross-admin"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":"","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
